test_cases.input_summary: Single-interview transcript excerpt, speaker changes, 25fps, start TC 01:03:22:00
test_cases.notes: Timecodes placed correctly at speaker changes. Format consistent throughout. Estimation disclaimer clear. Elapsed time plausible for word count.

test_cases.input_summary: Long single-speaker passage, 30-second fixed intervals, 29.97fps drop-frame, US production
test_cases.notes: Drop-frame semicolon notation correctly applied. Intervals placed at sentence boundaries, not mid-word. Long passage handled without drift beyond stated accuracy range.

test_cases.input_summary: Multi-speaker panel discussion, both speaker-change and 60-second interval timecodes, simplified HH:MM:SS format
test_cases.notes: Combined interval mode worked well. Speaker labels consistent across four speakers. Simplified format applied correctly. Noted that rapid speaker changes in discussion may create very frequent timecodes.
